title: FEE_STATUS_RESULT
description: Response from Keeper to Referee confirming fee deposit status for the queried party. Each Keeper responds only for deposits it holds. The Referee issues separate FEE_STATUS_QUERY messages to the Actor's Keeper and the Claimant's Keeper respectively.

incident_id.description: Incident identifier this status report corresponds to.

terminal_id.description: Terminal ID of the party whose deposit status is being reported.

deposited.description: Whether the queried party's FEE_DEPOSIT has been confirmed by this Keeper.

deposit_timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the FEE_DEPOSIT was received. Omitted if deposited is false.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this message was sent by the Keeper.

prior_assessment_count.description: Number of prior ASSESSMENT_ISSUED anchors recorded for this incident_id. 0 for a first assessment.

prior_verdict_refs.description: List of cert_id values from prior assessments of this incident_id. Empty for first assessments.

incident_id.description: The prior incident UUID as declared in the ASSESSMENT_REQUEST.

verified.description: True if a ASSESSMENT_ISSUED anchor for this incident_id exists in this Keeper.

cert_id.description: cert_id from the ASSESSMENT_ISSUED anchor. Omitted if verified is false.

verified_prior_incidents.description: (Optional) Verification results for each incident_id in prior_incident_ids. Present only when the Referee included prior_incident_ids in the FEE_STATUS_QUERY.
